mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug (name, generic_name, category, description, price, unit, specification, manufacturer, cover, is_otc, stock, status, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{genericName}, #{category}, #{description}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{specification}, #{manufacturer}, #{cover}, #{isOtc}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE drug
name = #{name},
generic_name = #{genericName},
category = #{category},
description = #{description},
price = #{price},
unit = #{unit},
specification = #{specification},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer},
cover = #{cover},
is_otc = #{isOtc},
stock = #{stock},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM drug WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drug_subscription ds WHERE ds.drug_id = d.id) AS subscription_count FROM drug d WHERE d.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_subscription (user_id, drug_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{drugId}, #{quantity})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM drug_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND drug_id = #{drugId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, ds.quantity AS subscription_count FROM drug d INNER JOIN drug_subscription ds ON d.id = ds.drug_id WHERE ds.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ds.create_time DESC

SELECT d.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drug_subscription ds WHERE ds.drug_id = d.id) AS subscription_count FROM drug d WHERE d.status = 1 AND (d.name LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') OR d.generic_name LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') OR d.category LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%')) ORDER BY d.name ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
